html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Midsummer Cawnival

Miniature Tree KitMiniature Tree

The Miniature Tree Kit can be crafted with 24 Prize Tickets at the Prize Booth and once placed down, it can be one of the 3 forms of Miniature Tree. The player can hammered it to get back its item form. Placing a Miniature Tree near a Cawnival Tree gives 24 points of decoration.

Trivia

  • The Miniature Tree was added as Midsummer Cawnival event first introduced to the game in 2021.

"carnivaldecor_plant"
Miniature Tree KitMiniature Tree
“Maybe it's a boxwood?”
–Wilson
“Can somebody else put it together for me?”
–Willow
“Ha! Is tiny and easy to make.”
–Wolfgang
“I suppose I should try to be useful...”
–Wendy
“ASSEMBLY REQUIRED”
–WX-78
“I wouldn't mind a bit of gardening.”
–Wickerbottom
“Might as well get it set up, eh?”
–Woodie
“There's no end to the work around here, it seems.”
–Maxwell
“It shall be döne at önce.”
–Wigfrid
“We can put it together!”
–Webber
“I'll have it whipped up in no time at all.”
–Warly
“Find nice place for friend”
–Wormwood
“I'll have that set up in a jiffy.”
–Winona
“Nearly there.”
–Wortox
“Where put little tree?”
–Wurt
“I'll have that up in a jiffy!”
–Walter
“A pocket-sized tree? I'm intrigued.”
–Wanda
“Either it's small, or I'm gigantic.”
–Wilson, when examining a Miniature Tree
“Guess this tree never got its growth spurt.”
–Willow, when examining a Miniature Tree
“Wolfgang could snap trunk like toothpick!”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Miniature Tree
“A small reminder of... a nice day.”
–Wendy, when examining a Miniature Tree
“IT IS HARDY AND DOESN'T NEED ANY CARE. MINIONS, LEARN FROM ITS EXAMPLE”
–WX-78, when examining a Miniature Tree
“It's so soothing to care for a small tree.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Miniature Tree
“This better not attract any smaller birds...”
–Woodie, when examining a Miniature Tree
“At least it's small and somewhat manageable.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Miniature Tree
“What use is a tree öf such small stature?”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Miniature Tree
“This tree is so small!”
–Webber, when examining a Miniature Tree
“Perhaps it will attract normal sized crows?”
–Warly, when examining a Miniature Tree
“Short friend”
–Wormwood, when examining a Miniature Tree
“You can't exactly hang a swing from it, but it's pretty enough.”
–Winona, when examining a Miniature Tree
“We can take a small bit of the Cawnival wherever we go.”
–Wortox, when examining a Miniature Tree
“How tree stay so small?”
–Wurt, when examining a Miniature Tree
“I'm going to take good care of it!”
–Walter, when examining a Miniature Tree
“I guess some trees can be interesting to look at after all.”
–Wanda, when examining a Miniature Tree
The Miniature Tree Kit can be crafted with 24 Prize Tickets at the Prize Booth and once placed down, it can be one of the 3 forms of Miniature Tree. The player can hammered it to get back its item form. Placing a Miniature Tree near a Cawnival Tree gives 24 points of decoration.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Miniature Tree was added as Midsummer Cawnival event first introduced to the game in 2021.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bộ Cây Thu Nhỏ có thể được chế tạo bằng 24 Vé Thưởng tại Quầy Giải thưởng và sau khi đặt xuống, nó có thể trở thành một trong 3 dạng Cây Thu Nhỏ. Người chơi có thể đập nó để lấy lại dạng vật phẩm. Đặt Cây thu nhỏ gần Cây Cawnival sẽ nhận được 24 điểm trang trí.

The '''Miniature Tree Kit''' can be crafted with 24 [[Prize Tickets]] at the [[Prize Booth]] and once placed down, it can be one of the 3 forms of '''Miniature Tree'''. The player can hammered it to get back its item form. Placing a Miniature Tree near a [[Cawnival Tree]] gives 24 points of decoration.
{{Clear}}

== {{Trivia}} Trivia ==
* The Miniature Tree was added as Midsummer Cawnival event first introduced to the game in 2021.
